fields.Root: The root to do processing for.
fields.Material: The material to replace text renderer materials with.
fields.Font: The font to override texts with.
fields.ProcessDisabled: Whether to process disabled texts or not.
fields.Color: What color to change the texts to.
fields._tag: Only process texts with this tag.

methods.SetColor: Handles when the user asks to change the color of all text under the target slot.
methods.ReplaceFont: Handles when the user asks to change the font of all text under the target slot.
methods.ReplaceMaterial: Handles when the user asks to change the material of all text under the target slot.
